128.reason: [Early return before DFS/BFS after deletion; the code exits here, so the traversal after deletion never executes]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Early return before DFS/BFS after deletion; the code exits here, so the traversal after deletion never executes]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This line prematurely exits the program, so the code after it (the second DFS and BFS) never executes. The return 0 should be removed or placed after the remaining traversal code.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  提前返回导致后续输出删除后遍历的代码无法执行，应删除此处的return 0或将return 0移到main函数末尾
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The return statement prematurely terminates the program, preventing the execution of the code that outputs the traversal sequences after deleting the vertex.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Compilation Error] The 'return 0;' statement is placed prematurely inside the main function, causing the subsequent code for the second DFS and BFS traversals to be unreachable. This results in missing output and may trigger a compilation error or warning due to unreachable code. It should be removed from this line and placed at the very end of the main function.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This premature return statement causes the program to terminate before executing the DFS and BFS traversals after vertex deletion. As a result, the last two required output lines are never printed.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Premature return statement causes the program to exit before printing DFS and BFS sequences after deletion. This skips the required output for the graph after vertex deletion.]
